description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Starting April 1, 2026 (Reiwa 8), the opening hours and closure days for Hanno City Library and Hanno Children's Library will change. This trial period runs until March 31, 2027.

【Hanno City Library】
Opening hours: Tuesday–Sunday 9:30 a.m.–6:00 p.m.
Closure days: Mondays (except national holidays), the day after a national holiday (open if that day is also a holiday), the last Friday of each month, one annual closure period for maintenance (5 days), year-end and New Year holidays, and other dates

【Hanno Children's Library】
Opening hours: Tuesday–Sunday 11:00 a.m.–4:00 p.m.
Closure days: Same as Hanno City Library

【Naguri and Fujimi Branch Libraries】
Both branches will close as of April 1, 2026. The bookmobile service will also suspend operations. However, Naguri District Administrative Center and Fujimi District Administrative Center will launch a new "book delivery service."

For detailed closure dates and service information, visit the Hanno City Library website.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kyoikubu/toshokan/13108.html
summary: ℹ️ Hanno City Library: Changes to opening hours and closure days from April 1, 2026
